proof: function[T0, T1](x0: Set[T0], x1: Set[T1], x2: Set[T0], x3: Set[T1]) { box[T0, T1](x0, x1) ∩ box[T0, T1](x2, x3) = box[T0, T1](x0 ∩ x2, x1 ∩ x3) }[X, Y](u1, v1, u2, v2)
function[T0, T1](x0: Set[T0], x1: Set[T1], x2: Set[T0], x3: Set[T1]) { box[T0, T1](x0, x1) ∩ box[T0, T1](x2, x3) = box[T0, T1](x0 ∩ x2, x1 ∩ x3) }[X, Y](u1, v1, u2, v2)
let w0: Pair[X, Y] satisfy { w0 ∈ box[X, Y](Set.empty_set[X], v) != w0 ∈ Set.empty_set[Pair[X, Y]] }
let w0: Pair[X, Y] satisfy { w0 ∈ box[X, Y](u, Set.empty_set[Y]) != w0 ∈ Set.empty_set[Pair[X, Y]] }
